name: Highwayman's Waystation
excerpt: A disused waystation where Dellan Moor and Sable Voss are hiding.
notes: The highwayman's waystation is located on the moorland north of the main coastal road, about two days' walk from the nearest town. It has a mostly intact roof, a fireplace, and a working well. Dellan Moor and Sable Voss have been living there for eight months, using it as a stable base after moving frequently.
